questions.question: What larger question does Ortlund say this video addresses, compared to debates like Nicaea II and icons?
options: What converting to Eastern Orthodoxy entails for one's prior Christian experience and for non-Orthodox Christians
Whether the Byzantine rite should be translated into English
How to harmonize Calvinism with Palamism
The date of Easter in the Julian versus Gregorian calendars
questions.answer: What converting to Eastern Orthodoxy entails for one's prior Christian experience and for non-Orthodox Christians

questions.question: Whose letter does Ortlund work through as the main text?
questions.answer: St. Theophan the Recluse

questions.question: Theophan was a nineteenth-century bishop from which context?
questions.answer: Russian Orthodoxy

questions.question: What occasioned Theophan's letter, according to Ortlund?
options: A political edict on religious toleration
An Orthodox Christian wrote after being shaken by an Evangelical preacher
questions.answer: An Orthodox Christian wrote after being shaken by an Evangelical preacher

questions.question: Theophan's first objection to the preacher is that he cannot be a true preacher of Christ because:
options: He has not been appointed a preacher by the church
He used the wrong translation of the Bible
questions.answer: He has not been appointed a preacher by the church

questions.question: Ortlund gestures to which Gospel episode as contrasting with the idea that only church-appointed ministers can be valid?
options: The disciples wanting to stop someone casting out demons in Jesus's name (Mark 9)
The feeding of the five thousand
questions.answer: The disciples wanting to stop someone casting out demons in Jesus's name (Mark 9)

questions.question: Theophan asks why the preacher would preach Christ to the correspondent, implying the correspondent already has Christ because:
options: The correspondent had memorized the Psalter
The correspondent has lived within the Holy Orthodox Church since childhood
questions.answer: The correspondent has lived within the Holy Orthodox Church since childhood

questions.question: How does Theophan ultimately classify the Evangelical preacher?
options: A heretic preaching 'another Christ' relative to apostolic teaching
questions.answer: A heretic preaching 'another Christ' relative to apostolic teaching

questions.question: In Theophan's four-stage narrative of falling away, what constitutes the first degree?
options: The pope of Rome falling away through sophistries
questions.answer: The pope of Rome falling away through sophistries

questions.question: In that same scheme, Protestants represent which degree?
questions.answer: Second degree

questions.question: Anglicanism is placed as which degree of the fall?
questions.answer: Third

questions.question: The fourth degree in Theophan's outline is tied to:
options: The line from an Anglican missionary to the present preacher troubling the correspondent
questions.answer: The line from an Anglican missionary to the present preacher troubling the correspondent

questions.question: Where does Theophan say the 'saving truth' is found?
options: In Scripture alone, judged by each reader
Equally in Rome, Canterbury, and Moscow
In any church that teaches the Nicene Creed
Only in the one true Orthodox Church
questions.answer: Only in the one true Orthodox Church

questions.question: Theophan compares deceptive use of Jesus's name to which teaching of Jesus?
options: Beware of false prophets in sheep's clothing (Matthew 7)
The vine and the branches only
questions.answer: Beware of false prophets in sheep's clothing (Matthew 7)

questions.question: Which Pauline letter does Theophan use to argue that true words can still be twisted into 'another gospel'?
questions.answer: Galatians

questions.question: Theophan compares the correspondent's situation to which Old Testament figure being deceived?
questions.answer: Eve (via 2 Corinthians 11)

questions.question: According to Ortlund's summary, Theophan insists that for salvation one needs faith and reception of grace through:
options: The divine mysteries (sacraments) within the church
questions.answer: The divine mysteries (sacraments) within the church

questions.question: Besides faith, works, and grace through mysteries, Theophan adds which necessity before the fifth?
options: The holy priesthood established by the Lord
questions.answer: The holy priesthood established by the Lord

questions.question: The fifth requirement Ortlund highlights is:
options: Living union with the body of the church and the faithful
questions.answer: Living union with the body of the church and the faithful

questions.question: One obligation Theophan names is to believe as the whole church has believed and:
options: Submit questions only to lay elders
Never disagree even slightly with her teaching
questions.answer: Never disagree even slightly with her teaching

questions.question: The letter recommends studying which book for 'detox' from the preacher's teaching?
questions.answer: The Rock of Faith

questions.question: Ortlund summarizes the letter's posture toward the Evangelical teacher as:
options: Shun him as contamination and the enemy's attack
Receive him as a brother with different rites
questions.answer: Shun him as contamination and the enemy's attack

questions.question: Ortlund's stated 'two options' include: Theophan and this tradition are wrong, or:
options: The filioque is the only barrier
Western Christians broadly lack the means of salvation described in the letter
questions.answer: Western Christians broadly lack the means of salvation described in the letter

questions.question: Ortlund raises which concern about Theophan's ecclesial soteriology?
options: That the church might functionally replace Christ as savior (idolatry of the church)
That it makes the calendar too complicated
questions.answer: That the church might functionally replace Christ as savior (idolatry of the church)

questions.question: Ortlund appeals to 'good tree / good fruit' reasoning from which Gospel line of teaching?
questions.answer: Matthew 7 and 12

questions.question: Ortlund claims historic Protestant figures such as Luther and Calvin did not typically assert that:
options: The Eastern Orthodox had no church or salvation
questions.answer: The Eastern Orthodox had no church or salvation
